PreToolUse.approval_message: Potentially destructive WP-CLI operation detected. Review before proceeding.

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'wp (core update|db (drop|reset|import)|search-replace)' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(--dry-run|check-update|verify-checksums)'; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/wp-safety-check.sh"; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '^wp |wp-cli|wp @'; then echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] WP-CLI: $(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | head -c 200)" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wp-cli-audit.log" 2>/dev/null; fi
